name: Teddy Napoleon
abstract: Teddy Napoleon (January 23, 1914 – July 5, 1964) was an American swing jazz pianist. He was the nephew of Phil Napoleon and the older brother of Marty Napoleon.

concerts.label: Carnegie Pop Concert: Jazz at the Philharmonic
All-Star Jazz Concert and Recording Session

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Davern
about_quotes.evidence: my teacher was Joe Napoleon, who was Phil Napoleon’s brother, and there were five brothers of which Marty Napoleon and Teddy Napoleon were nephews.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Davern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]
